Theme
Sign in Request Demo
Industries

Your AI Agent for
Industry Leading Experiences

A new way to delight and support your customers, users, and operators across automotive, healthcare, consumer electronics, and beyond.

Industries

Complex products. Engaging journeys.
One platform.

GLUCOSE is built for industries where customer engagement is hard: high intermediation, product complexity, education requirements, and economics that break traditional CRM.

Where We Win First

Automotive, Mobility & Transportation

Revolutionize the entire ownership journey from consideration to second purchase.

Commercial & Industrial Vehicles

Keep fleets running with autonomous AI support for diagnostics, maintenance, and operations.

Industrial Appliances & Machineries

Maximize asset utilization with real-time operator support and maintenance guidance.

Consumer Appliances

Turn unboxing into brand loyalty with feature discovery and personalized guidance.

Healthcare

Provide always-on, personalized care while managing costs and compliance.
Expansion Verticals

Buildings & Property Units

Intelligent engagement for property occupants, tenants, and buyers.

Financial Services

Build stronger relationships with immediate, personalized, and secure interactions.

Energy & Utilities

Modernize customer engagement with proactive insights and automated support.

Hospitality & Travel

Elevate the guest experience from booking to checkout with AI concierge.

Consumer Goods

Own the direct-to-consumer relationship and drive repeat purchases.
Automotive & Mobility

Transform the entire ownership journey

From first consideration to second purchase, GLUCOSE engages customers at every touchpoint—discovery, configuration, ownership education, maintenance, feature discovery, and trade-in engagement.

Vehicle Configuration & Discovery

Help customers explore models, compare trims, understand features, and configure their perfect vehicle through natural conversation.

Ownership Onboarding

Proactively introduce features, explain controls, and personalize the ownership experience from day one—reducing "how-to" support calls.

Service & Maintenance

Schedule service appointments, explain maintenance alerts, guide troubleshooting, and integrate with DMS systems for seamless experience.

Feature Discovery

Most owners never discover half the features they paid for. GLUCOSE contextually introduces features based on usage patterns and preferences.

50%+ of vehicle features go unused by owners
24/7 support without call center overhead
50+ languages for global deployment
Commercial & Industrial Vehicles

Keep fleets running with autonomous AI support

From trucks and buses to construction equipment, GLUCOSE enables OEMs and fleet operators to provide instant diagnostics, maintenance scheduling, and driver support — reducing downtime and operational costs.

Predictive Maintenance

AI agents that alert operators before breakdowns, schedule service, and coordinate parts availability.

Driver & Operator Support

24/7 multimodal assistance for vehicle operation, troubleshooting, and compliance documentation.

Fleet Analytics

Capture first-party data on usage patterns, common issues, and operator needs across your entire fleet.

Explore Commercial Vehicles
Healthcare

Personalized care that scales

Patient engagement that respects complexity. Personalized guidance while maintaining compliance. Amplifying clinician reach, not replacing them.

Medical Device Education

Guide patients through device setup, usage instructions, and ongoing support for complex medical equipment—from glucose monitors to CPAP machines.

Treatment Journey Support

Proactive reminders, medication guidance, and personalized health information throughout the patient journey—with full compliance controls.

Appointment Management

Schedule, reschedule, and provide pre-appointment instructions through natural conversation across messaging platforms.

Compliance & Guardrails

Built-in IGDs (Instructions & Guidelines Documents) ensure GLUCOSE operates within strict healthcare compliance requirements.

Always-On patient support outside office hours
Compliant with healthcare regulations
Multimodal text, voice, images for accessibility
Consumer Appliances

Turn unboxing into brand loyalty

Most customers never discover half the features they paid for. GLUCOSE helps them explore, learn, and get more value—building brand love instead of support tickets.

Product Onboarding

Guide users through setup, initial configuration, and first-use experiences for smart home devices, appliances, and electronics.

Feature Education

Contextually introduce advanced features based on user behavior and preferences—turning casual users into power users.

Troubleshooting & Support

Instant, 24/7 troubleshooting through natural conversation—reducing support ticket volume while improving customer satisfaction.

Accessory & Upgrade Recommendations

Contextual recommendations for compatible accessories, software updates, and product upgrades based on usage patterns.

Reduced support ticket volume
Increased feature adoption rates
Higher customer lifetime value
Financial Services

Build trust at scale

Contextual guidance for complex, personal financial products—account questions, product education, life-stage recommendations—with control and compliance built in.

Product Recommendations

Provide personalized guidance to help customers choose the best financial products for their needs—increasing acquisition and cross-sell rates.

Account Support

Respond immediately to questions about account balances, fees, transactions, and policies—boosting customer trust and satisfaction.

Life-Stage Engagement

Proactively engage customers during major life events—home buying, retirement planning, education funding—with contextual product information.

Security & Compliance

Enterprise-grade security with encrypted data, compliance guardrails, and audit logging for regulated financial services.

Secure enterprise-grade encryption
Compliant with financial regulations
Immediate personalized responses
Retail & Consumer Goods

Seamless customer experiences

Boost brand loyalty, conversion, and lifetime value with personalized product guidance and post-purchase support.

Product Discovery

Help shoppers find the perfect product through conversational commerce—understanding needs and recommending solutions.

Order Support

Track orders, handle returns, process exchanges, and resolve issues instantly through natural conversation.

Product Usage Guidance

Provide ongoing support for complex products—assembly instructions, care guides, usage tips, and troubleshooting.

Loyalty & Re-engagement

Personalized recommendations, reorder reminders, and loyalty program engagement to drive repeat purchases.

Increased conversion rates
Reduced return and exchange rates
Higher repeat purchase rates
Industrial Equipment & Machinery

Maximize asset utilization

GLUCOSE provides tailored, real-time insights and assistance for complex industrial equipment—enhancing operational efficiency for fleet managers and operators alike.

Operator Training

On-demand guidance for equipment operation, safety procedures, and best practices—reducing training time and errors.

Maintenance Support

Proactive maintenance reminders, troubleshooting assistance, and service scheduling integrated with your systems.

IoT Integration

Connect GLUCOSE to IoT sensors for context-aware support—responding to equipment alerts with relevant guidance.

Documentation Access

Instant access to manuals, specifications, and procedures through natural conversation—no more searching through binders.

Minimized equipment downtime
Improved safety compliance
Enhanced operator efficiency
Buildings & Property Units

Intelligent engagement for property occupants and buyers

From smart buildings to residential developments, GLUCOSE helps property managers and developers engage with tenants, buyers, and visitors through autonomous AI that handles inquiries, schedules viewings, and manages facility requests.

Tenant Support

Autonomous handling of maintenance requests, facility bookings, and community communications.

Property Sales

Qualify leads, schedule viewings, and guide prospective buyers through property features via WhatsApp and chat.

Smart Building Integration

Connect to IoT systems for real-time facility management, energy monitoring, and occupant notifications.

Explore Property Solutions
Energy & Utilities

Modernize customer engagement for energy providers

GLUCOSE helps energy and utility companies automate customer support, manage service requests, and deliver proactive usage insights — improving satisfaction while reducing operational burden.

Usage & Billing Support

Autonomous agents that explain bills, compare plans, and process account changes instantly.

Proactive Notifications

Alert customers about outages, maintenance windows, and consumption anomalies before they contact you.

Demand Response

Engage customers in energy-saving programs through intelligent, personalized communication campaigns.

Explore Energy Solutions
Hospitality & Travel

Elevate the guest experience from booking to checkout

GLUCOSE enables hotels, resorts, and travel operators to deliver concierge-level service at scale — handling reservations, answering questions, and personalizing recommendations via the channels guests already use.

AI Concierge

Autonomous guest support for bookings, room service, local recommendations, and special requests.

Multilingual Engagement

Serve international guests in 50+ languages across WhatsApp, LINE, and other regional channels.

Loyalty & Upsell

Proactively engage guests with personalized upgrade offers, loyalty rewards, and post-stay follow-ups.

Explore Hospitality Solutions
Consumer Goods

Own the direct-to-consumer relationship

GLUCOSE helps CPG and consumer goods brands engage directly with end consumers, bypassing retail intermediaries to build brand loyalty, gather product feedback, and drive repeat purchases.

Product Education

Guide consumers through product features, usage tips, and care instructions via conversational AI.

Consumer Insights

Capture first-party data on preferences, feedback, and purchase intent directly from conversations.

Lifecycle Engagement

Proactive re-engagement for refills, upgrades, and loyalty programs — building long-term brand relationships.

Explore Consumer Solutions
Why GLUCOSE

One platform for every industry

Regardless of your industry, GLUCOSE delivers consistent value through its enterprise-grade agentic AI platform.

Multilingual

50+ languages for global deployment

Multimodal

Text, voice, images, and video

Omnichannel

WhatsApp, Telegram, Line, Viber, and more

Enterprise Security

AWS-powered, encrypted, compliant

Analytics

First-party data and contextual insights

No-Code Management

Configure without technical expertise

Get Started

for your industry

See how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise deliver autonomous brand and product experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.
